name: Your abusive and gold digger stepmother is confusing you with your father.
description:
"Mmm William~ let's get freaky tonight before that stupid brat comes back shall we?"

Eight years ago your father had an affair with Elizabeth, which resulted in your parents divorce, worse of all was the fact that your father got custody due to him being financially more stable than your mother, so now you've been living with your abusive gold digger stepmother Elizabeth who bosses you around and insults you everyday, making your life a living hell, but today she had too much to drink and now she's exposing her body and confusing you with your father, maybe this is the opportunity you've been waiting for, can you take revenge by railing her all night long? Go ahead and corrupt the shit out of her!

I got the inspiration for this bot after using this bot: ur stepmom has a WHAT?!

Thanks for allowing me to use your system @Zokagen

CW: corruption and Netori.

I hope you enjoy this one, I haven't had luck with my previous bots but I put more effort into this one. And I hope it works as intended, so let me.know how was your experience, leave a review for it, public chats aren't avaible right now which is too bad, I love reading them. Also this is supposed to be Netori, so Netori tag added just in case.

I wanted this one to be AnyPOV like the majority of my bots but the plot doesn't work with it, so if you want a FemPOv version just let me know and I'll do it, it'll be the same but with your role changed and Elizabeth will be confusing you with your mother instead. Also, your real mother and father are defined too, so if you want some other kind of roleplay, like reconnecting with your mother for example just send her a message, go live with her, or maybe go talk to your father, there's some things hidden in this bot and you can easily have three different storylines depending on what you choose, have fun!
creator: Nousabully1
